message:
feat(tui): wire DashboardState into QueryClient and view_adapters (ft-3hbv9)

Phase 2 of ft-3hbv9: integrates the dashboard module into the TUI layer.

- Add `dashboard_state()` to `QueryClient` trait (default returns None)
- Add `DashboardModel`, `adapt_dashboard()` and supporting row types to
  `view_adapters.rs` following the established adapter pattern
- Add `dashboard: Option<DashboardState>` field to `ViewState`

The adapter transforms DashboardState into render-ready models with
styled labels for health tier, cost, rate limits, backpressure, and
quota panels. Framework-agnostic (no ratatui/ftui imports).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
